debug_info.goal:
w : Nat
x y : BitVec w
⊢ (x = y) = (BitVec.beq w x y = true)

failed_attempts:
by
    apply Eq.symm
    apply Eq.symm
    rw [BitVec.ext_iff]
    unfold beq
    induction w with
    | zero => simp
    | succ w ih =>
      simp_all [Nat.sub_zero, Nat.sub_succ, Nat.zero_sub]
      <;> try simp_all [Nat.succ_sub_succ, Nat.zero_sub]

by
    apply Eq.symm
    apply Eq.symm
    apply propext
    apply Iff.intro
    · intro h
      rw [h]
      induction w with
      | zero => simp [beq]
      | succ w ih =>
        simp_all [beq, Nat.sub_zero, Nat.zero_sub]
    · intro h
      induction w with
      | zero => simp_all [beq]
      | succ w ih =>
        simp_all [beq, Nat.sub_zero, Nat.zero_sub]
        apply BitVec.eq_of_veq
        intro i
        have : i < w + 1 := by
          apply Nat.lt_succ_iff.mpr
          apply Nat.le_of_lt_succ
          apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt
          apply Nat.zero_le
          apply Nat.lt_succ_self
        cases' Nat.lt_or_ge i w with hi hi
        · simp_all [Nat.sub_eq_of_le, Nat.le_of_lt]
        · have : i = w := by
            apply Nat.le_antisymm
            · apply Nat.le_of_not_gt
              intro h'
              apply hi
              apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt
              apply Nat.le_refl
              apply h'
            · apply hi
          rw [this]
          simp_all [Nat.sub_self, Nat.zero_sub]
